needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Multiset.card {α : Type u_1} : Multiset α → ℕ
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To express the length of a partition as `Multiset.card p.parts`.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Multiset.card_map {α β : Type u_1} (f : α → β) (s : Multiset α) : card (map f s) = card s
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To relate cardinalities when mapping parts.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Multiset.filter_le {α : Type u_1} (p : α → Bool) (s : Multiset α) : filter p s ≤ s
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To bound the cardinality of filtered parts.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Multiset.card_le_card {α : Type u_1} {s t : Multiset α} (h : s ≤ t) : card s ≤ card t
Finset.card_univ {α : Type u_1} [Fintype α] : card (univ : Finset α) = Fintype.card α
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To know the size of `Finset.univ` for `Fin N`.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: List.Sorted {α : Type u_1} (r : α → α → Prop) [DecidableRel r] : List α → Prop
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To express that a list is weakly decreasing.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: List.Sorted.le_of_lt {α : Type u_1} [Preorder α] {l : List α} (h : l.Sorted (· ≥ ·)) {i j : ℕ} (hi : j < l.length) (hij : i ≤ j) : l.get ⟨j, hi⟩ ≤ l.get ⟨i, by omega⟩
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To prove the `antitone` condition for `fromPartition` when using a sorted list.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: List.get {α : Type u_1} (l : List α) (n : Fin l.length) : α
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To index into a list by a `Fin`.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: List.length {α : Type u_1} : List α → ℕ
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To express the length of a list.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: List.ofFn {α : Type u_1} {n : ℕ} (f : Fin n → α) : List α
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To convert an `NPartition` (function `Fin N → ℕ`) to a list for dropping trailing zeros.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: List.dropWhile {α : Type u_1} (p : α → Bool) : List α → List α
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To drop trailing zeros from the list of parts.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: List.reverse {α : Type u_1} : List α → List α
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To drop trailing zeros, we reverse, dropWhile (==0), reverse back.
